title: cordia megalantha
intro: Cordia megalantha, also known as the White Jade Flower, is a flowering plant species in the bignonia family. It is native to the tropical forests of Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cordia megalantha include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and reduce stress, making it a valuable herb in the treatment of various health conditions. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed orally to reap its benefits.
